3077410.name: Brabatos
3077410.description:
Command a team of heroes in this physics-based medieval football/soccer game. Train and upgrade your team as you progress through a world torn by conflict, uncovering each character’s tales while exposing the dark schemes of corrupt nobles.

Begin your journey in makeshift tournaments and fight your way to the grandest arenas in the land, where bloodthirsty crowds will judge your performance without mercy.

But beware! Your opponents will stop at nothing to win. Expect neither fair play from them nor justice from the Brabeutos who determine the fate of each match.

Features

  • Fast paced action - Easy to grasp yet hard to master real-time physics mechanics.

  • RPG Style Progression - Unlock and upgrade new characters in an RPG-like progression

  • Sandbox mode - Play at your own pace, unblocking tournaments as you improve your skills and those of your team.

  • Challenge - Win against all odds when facing popular opponents that will use any resource at their disposal to beat you.

  • Dynamic audience - Spectators responds to the match development and even actively participates.

Note: Brabatos is currently in development. Features, content, and mechanics are subject to change as we continue to build, test, and improve the experience based on player feedback.
3077410.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
